message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant Database
participant ManageLogDemo
participant ManageLogReceiveFacade
participant ManageLogReceiveProvider
participant ManageLogCommon
participant AnotherJavaProject
participant ManageLogUploadFacade
participant AnotherProject
participant ManageLogQueryProvider
participant ManageLogQueryFacade

actor ManageLogDemo
actor ManageLogReceiveFacade
actor ManageLogReceiveProvider
actor ManageLogCommon
actor AnotherJavaProject
actor ManageLogUploadFacade
actor AnotherProject
actor ManageLogQueryProvider
actor ManageLogQueryFacade

rectangle rpc 上传日志 {
    ManageLogDemo as aspect 获取数据
    aspect 获取数据 -> ManageLogReceiveFacade: rpc/http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
    ManageLogReceiveFacade -> ManageLogCommon: 使用工具类
    ManageLogCommon -> ManageLogReceiveProvider: 抓取配置
    ManageLogReceiveProvider <- ManageLogCommon: 落地数据
}

rectangle 自主使用 facade 上传日志 {
    ManageLogReceiveFacade 自己组装数据，使用 facade 提供的策略上传
    ManageLogReceiveFacade -> AnotherJavaProject: rpc/http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
    AnotherJavaProject -> ManageLogCommon: 使用工具类
    ManageLogCommon -> ManageLogReceiveProvider: 抓取配置
    ManageLogReceiveProvider <- AnotherJavaProject: 落地数据
}

rectangle 自主上传日志 {
    AnotherJavaProject -> ManageLogReceiveProvider: http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
    ManageLogReceiveProvider -> AnotherJavaProject: 使用工具类
    AnotherJavaProject <- ManageLogReceiveProvider: 抓取配置
    ManageLogReceiveProvider <- AnotherJavaProject: 落地数据
}

rectangle 日志查询 {
    ManageLogQueryFacade 获取数据
    ManageLogQueryFacade -> ManageLogQueryProvider: rpc 提供
    ManageLogQueryProvider -> ManageLogQueryFacade: http 提供（默认）
}

@enduml
